title: Marketing & Videographer Editor
description:
Role: Marketing & Videographer (Filming & Editing)

Location: On-site (Cafe & Roastery)
Type: Full-time / Part-time / Freelance

Role Overview

We are looking for a creative, self-motivated individual who can independently handle social media content creation, video filming and editing, and assist with marketing and operational needs. You will play a key role in sharing our story, products, and cafe experiences through compelling video content, and maintaining a strong daily presence across our social platforms.

Key Responsibilities

1. Content Creation & Video Production

  • Film and edit engaging short-form and long-form videos featuring:
    Cafe food & drink preparation
    Coffee machines and brewing techniques
    Coffee beans & roasting process
    Behind-the-scenes of the cafe & roastery
    Staff highlights and customer stories
    Coffee culture and education content
  • Output expectations:
    Short-form video per day (Reel/TikTok/FB) or long-form video every 2 days (YouTube or IGTV if applicable)
  • Plan, create, and publish 1 post per day on Instagram, Facebook, and TikTok using content from video.
  • Create and publish 1 blog post per week.
  • Ensure video quality is high, brand-aligned, and optimized for platform-specific engagement.

2. Social Media Management

  • Plan, create, and publish 1 post per day on Instagram, Facebook, and TikTok.
  • Write engaging captions and use appropriate hashtags.
  • Write blog posts on how to b
  • Monitor trends, audio, and formats to keep content fresh and relevant.
  • Manage community engagement (likes, comments, DMs) and track performance metrics.

3. Marketing Support

  • Assist in planning and executing marketing campaigns and promotions.
  • Contribute to brand storytelling, content calendars, and seasonal launch strategies.
  • Help brainstorm creative ideas to grow followers and drive foot traffic.

4. Operational Support (Ad-Hoc)

  • Support the broader team with operational tasks when needed (e.g., during busy periods or events).
  • Help with merchandising, promotional displays, or content needs for partners.

Requirements

  • Proven experience in videography and video editing (portfolio required).
  • Strong skills in Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, or similar editing software.
  • Experience managing brand social media accounts, particularly Instagram, Facebook, and TikTok.
  • Ability to work independently—comfortable filming and editing solo.
  • Strong organizational skills and ability to meet daily content deadlines.
  • Passion for coffee and storytelling is a big plus.
  • Flexibility to adapt to changing needs and jump in where needed across the team.
  • Independent, accountable, punctual, motivated and a team player.

Bonus Skills (Not Required but Preferred)

  • Photography skills for still content
  • Proficient at Social media editing.
  • Basic graphic design (Photoshop & Premiere Pro / Video editing software).
  • Knowledge of the coffee industry or experience in hospitality.
  • Drone or gimbal experience for dynamic shots.

MONDAY-FRIDAY ROLE.

LOCATION: PANDAN LOOP & LORONG KILAT
